---
title: "Continuum Mechanics: From Fundamentals to Biological Tissue"
subtitle: "Track F — Physical Systems"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Continuum Mechanics: From Fundamentals to Biological Tissue

**Track**: Track F — Physical Systems

The mathematical theory of continuous media: solids, fluids, and biological tissues. Provides the unified framework for biomechanics, fluid dynamics, and any model involving deformable bodies.

## Table of Contents

1. Kinematics of Deformation
2. Stress and Balance Laws
3. Constitutive Theory: Principles and Constraints
4. Linear Elasticity
5. Hyperelasticity
6. Viscoelasticity
7. Biological Tissue Mechanics
8. Growth and Remodeling
9. Poroelasticity and Mixture Theory
10. Computational Continuum Mechanics

---

## Chapter 1: Kinematics of Deformation

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Stress and Balance Laws

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Constitutive Theory: Principles and Constraints

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Linear Elasticity

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: Hyperelasticity

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Viscoelasticity

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Biological Tissue Mechanics

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Growth and Remodeling

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 9: Poroelasticity and Mixture Theory

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 10: Computational Continuum Mechanics

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
